name: registry_delete_removal_com_hijacking_registry_key
raw_query: any where registry.path:"*\\shell\\open\\command" and (not (process.executable:"*C:\\Windows\\explorer.exe" or process.executable:"C:\\Windows\\system32\\svchost.exe" or (process.executable like~ ("C:\\Windows\\System32\\msiexec.exe", "C:\\Windows\\SysWOW64\\msiexec.exe")) or (process.executable like~ ("C:\\Program Files\\*", "C:\\Program Files (x86)\\*")) or process.executable:"C:\\Windows\\System32\\OpenWith.exe")) and (not ((process.executable:"*\\Dropbox.exe" and registry.path:"*\\Dropbox.*") or (process.executable:"*\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\Wireshark_uninstaller.exe" and registry.path:"*\\wireshark-capture-file\\*") or (process.executable:"*peazip*" and registry.path:"*\\PeaZip.*") or (process.executable:"*\\Everything.exe" and registry.path:"*\\Everything.*") or process.executable:"C:\\Windows\\Installer\\MSI*" or (process.executable:"C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Java\\*" and process.executable:"*\\installer.exe" and registry.path:"*\\Classes\\WOW6432Node\\CLSID\\{4299124F-F2C3-41b4-9C73-9236B2AD0E8F}*") or process.executable:"*\\Microsoft\\EdgeUpdate\\Install*" or ((process.executable like~ ("C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Avira\\Antivirus\\", "C:\\Program Files\\Avira\\Antivirus\\")) and (registry.path like~ ("*\\CLSID\\{305CA226-D286-468e-B848-2B2E8E697B74}\\Shell\\Open\\Command", "*\\AntiVir.Keyfile\\shell\\open\\command"))) or ((process.executable:"*AppData\\Local\\Temp*" and process.executable:"*\\setup.exe*") or (process.executable:"*\\Temp\\is-*" and process.executable:"*\\target.tmp*")) or process.executable:"*\\ninite.exe" or (process.executable:"*\\reg.exe" and registry.path:"*\\Discord\\shell\\open\\command") or (process.executable:"*\\Spotify.exe" and registry.path:"*\\Spotify\\shell\\open\\command") or (process.executable:"*C:\\eclipse\\eclipse.exe" and registry.path:"*_Classes\\eclipse+*") or (process.executable:"*\\Temp*" and process.executable:"*\\TeamViewer*")))
